ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the passenger */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the passenger */,
  "class" INTEGER /* Travel class of the passenger (foreign key to classes) */,
  "embarked" INTEGER /* Embarkation point of the passenger (foreign key to embarkation_points) */,
  "fare" INTEGER /* Fare paid by the passenger (foreign key to fares) */,
  "sibsp" INTEGER /* Number of siblings/spouses aboard */,
  "parch" INTEGER /* Number of parents/children aboard */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Survival outcome (0 = did not survive, 1 = survived) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the passenger */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the passenger */,
  "lifeboat" TEXT /* Lifeboat number the passenger was on, if applicable */,
  "cabin" TEXT /* Cabin number assigned to the passenger */,
  "ticket" TEXT /* Ticket number */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the passenger */,
  "passenger_type" TEXT /* Type of passenger (e.g., crew, passenger) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_embarked FOREIGN KEY ("embarked") REFERENCES embarkation_points ("embarkation_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_fare FOREIGN KEY ("fare") REFERENCES fares ("fare_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_class FOREIGN KEY ("class") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class (e.g., 1st, 2nd, 3rd) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the class */,
  "deck" TEXT /* Deck number where the class is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "embarkation_points" (
  "embarkation_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each embarkation point */,
  "embarkation_point_name" TEXT /* Name of the embarkation point */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the embarkation point */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the embarkation point */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates (latitude and longitude) of the embarkation point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("embarkation_point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fares" (
  "fare_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fare */,
  "fare_amount" REAL /* Amount of the fare */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the fare */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the fare (e.g., cash, credit card) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the fare was paid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fare_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "family_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family relationship */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of family relationship (e.g., sibling, parent, child) */,
  "family_member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related family member */,
  "relationship_description" TEXT /* More detailed description of the family relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_family_relationships_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_family_relationships_family_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("family_member_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survival_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survival outcome */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Survival outcome (0 = did not survive, 1 = survived) */,
  "cause_of_death" TEXT /* Cause of death (if applicable) */,
  "rescue_location" TEXT /* Location where the passenger was rescued */,
  "rescue_date" TEXT /* Date when the passenger was rescued */,
  "medical_condition" TEXT /* Medical condition of the passenger at the time of rescue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survival_outcomes_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, query) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user executing the query */,
  "query_date" TEXT /* Date when the query was executed */,
  "query_text" TEXT /* Text of the query */,
  "query_status" TEXT /* Status of the query (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Time taken to execute the query (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_queries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query result */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query that generated the result */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was generated */,
  "result_data" TEXT /* Data returned by the query */,
  "result_size" INTEGER /* Size of the result data (in bytes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_results_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id")
)
